examples.vote_description: Streamlining Procurement for Effective Execution and Delivery and National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026
examples.reason: FY2026 NDAA (National Defense Authorization Act) — authorizes military spending, procurement, and personnel. Defense contractors strongly support annual NDAA passage as it funds weapons systems and military programs.

Middle Class Borrower Protection Act — eliminates FHFA fee structure that charged higher-credit borrowers more to cross-subsidize lower-credit borrowers. Realtors and mortgage lenders supported this as it reduces costs for their core buyer demographic.
Israel Security Assistance Support Act — provides security assistance to Israel, a core AIPAC priority.

examples.vote_description: SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Reauthorization Act
examples.reason: SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Reauthorization Act — reauthorizes opioid treatment programs and community health services. Healthcare industry supports as it funds treatment programs and drives patient volume.

examples.vote_description: Making supplemental appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2024, and for other purposes
examples.reason: FY2024 supplemental defense appropriations — additional military spending including for Ukraine, Israel, and Indo-Pacific. Defense contractors benefit from supplemental procurement.

highlights.issue: Universal background checks for gun purchases
Build a wall on the U.S.-Mexico border
Require permits to carry concealed guns
